return(function(q,f,Y,p,w,y,W,Z,L,O,Q,x,R,d,D,T,c,h,l,S,v,t,r)r,L,S,h,Z,R,x,O,Q,c,t,D,T,l,d,v={},function(q,F)local f=v(F)local Y=function(Y)return D(q,{Y},F,f)end return Y end,function(q,F)local
